{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LyXcwFovZFsuNmQQ3GG428","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    26→    displayName.trim(),\n    27→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    28→    session.userId\n    29→  );\n    30→\n    31→  // Update session\n    32→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    33→  await session.save();\n    34→\n    35→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    36→}\n    37→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"afc9bdbc-8266-41c4-ba9e-0e25b3f6d136","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:01:53.267Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a0167aa97356b7a54","tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","description":"Reading app/api/notifications/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":19175,"tool_uses":13,"duration_ms":8548},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"c6a49d99-51e7-4839-bab7-9b54a55f1007","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01WvkBSMws2dXy1ayVE9CaGd","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_019nfxhVJcr9S76FaigEnMkS","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/notifications/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":7,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3361,"cache_read_input_tokens":15761,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3361,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"6b60fe3c-f212-47d6-bc6c-7e9334f4d35f"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019nfxhVJcr9S76FaigEnMkS","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const notifications = db\n    12→    .prepare(\n    13→      `SELECT n.*, l.book_title\n    14→       FROM notifications n\n    15→       LEFT JOIN listings l ON n.listing_id = l.id\n    16→       WHERE n.user_id = ?\n    17→       ORDER BY n.created_at DESC\n    18→       LIMIT 50`\n    19→    )\n    20→    .all(session.userId);\n    21→\n    22→  const unreadCount = db\n    23→    .prepare(\n    24→      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\"\n    25→    )\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    notifications,\n    30→    unreadCount: unreadCount.count,\n    31→  });\n    32→}\n    33→\n    34→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n    35→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    36→  if (!session) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  const { notificationId } = await req.json();\n    41→\n    42→  if (notificationId) {\n    43→    db.prepare(\n    44→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    45→    ).run(notificationId, session.userId);\n    46→  } else {\n    47→    // Mark all as read\n    48→    db.prepare(\n    49→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = ?\"\n    50→    ).run(session.userId);\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    54→}\n    55→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"0750025b-0d70-43ff-a9a1-d687113d4065","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:01:53.459Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a0167aa97356b7a54","tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","description":"Reading app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":23906,"tool_uses":14,"duration_ms":10413},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"6ae347b9-4c56-4a4a-919a-0eb684f0c732","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01SYMpfAAvwe3VHPfdEYnNQH","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01JC1Tn8dJTa5HWsqtfV7Q1m","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":7,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4723,"cache_read_input_tokens":19122,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4723,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":4,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"1d2ef76e-7087-4eb6-b9f1-dcf69ce74172"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01JC1Tn8dJTa5HWsqtfV7Q1m","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\n     6→  sendMessage,\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n     8→} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     9→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    10→\n    11→/**\n    12→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n    13→ *\n    14→ * Handles two types of updates:\n    15→ *\n    16→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n    17→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n    18→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    19→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    20→ *\n    21→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    22→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n    23→ */\n    24→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    25→  // Verify webhook secret if configured\n    26→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    27→  if (webhookSecret) {\n    28→    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    29→    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    30→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→    }\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n    35→  try {\n    36→    update = await req.json();\n    37→  } catch {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n    42→  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    43→    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n    44→      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    45→    );\n    46→  }\n    47→\n    48→  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n    49→  if (update.message) {\n    50→    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n    54→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    55→}\n    56→\n    57→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\n    58→  chat: {\n    59→    id: number;\n    60→    title?: string;\n    61→    type: string;\n    62→  };\n    63→  from: {\n    64→    id: number;\n    65→    first_name: string;\n    66→  };\n    67→  new_chat_member: {\n    68→    user: {\n    69→      id: number;\n    70→      is_bot: boolean;\n    71→    };\n    72→    status: string;\n    73→  };\n    74→}\n    75→\n    76→interface TelegramMessage {\n    77→  chat: {\n    78→    id: number;\n    79→    type: string;\n    80→    title?: string;\n    81→  };\n    82→  text?: string;\n    83→  from?: {\n    84→    id: number;\n    85→  };\n    86→}\n    87→\n    88→/**\n    89→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n    90→ *\n    91→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n    92→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n    93→ * 1. Creates the group\n    94→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n    95→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n    96→ *\n    97→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n    98→ */\n    99→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n   100→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n   101→\n   102→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n   103→  if (\n   104→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n   105→    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n   106→  ) {\n   107→    return;\n   108→  }\n   109→\n   110→  // Only process group chats\n   111→  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n   112→    return;\n   113→  }\n   114→\n   115→  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n   116→  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n   117→  const pending = db\n   118→    .prepare(\n   119→      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n   120→    )\n   121→    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n   122→\n   123→  if (pending) {\n   124→    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n   125→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n   126→      chat.id\n   127→    );\n   128→    return;\n   129→  }\n   130→\n   131→  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n   132→  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n   133→  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n   134→  await sendMessage(\n   135→    chat.id,\n   136→    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n   137→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n   138→      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n   139→  );\n   140→\n   141→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n   142→  try {\n   143→    db.prepare(\n   144→      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n   145→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n   146→  } catch {\n   147→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n   148→  }\n   149→}\n   150→\n   151→/**\n   152→ * Handle messages in group chats.\n   153→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n   154→ */\n   155→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n   156→  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n   157→    return;\n   158→  }\n   159→\n   160→  const text = message.text.trim();\n   161→\n   162→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n   163→  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n   164→    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n   165→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n   166→    if (listingId) {\n   167→      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   168→      return;\n   169→    }\n   170→  }\n   171→\n   172→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n   173→  if (text === \"/link\") {\n   174→    // Find the most recent full listing without a telegram link\n   175→    // that was authored by someone (we can't verify Telegram user = Bookmate user\n   176→    // without account linking, so we just report available listings)\n   177→    const unlinkedListings = db\n   178→      .prepare(\n   179→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n   180→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n   181→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n   182→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n   183→      )\n   184→      .all() as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n   185→\n   186→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n   187→      await sendMessage(\n   188→        message.chat.id,\n   189→        \"No unlinked reading groups found. The group may already be set up!\"\n   190→      );\n   191→      return;\n   192→    }\n   193→\n   194→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n   195→      // Auto-link the only available listing\n   196→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n   197→      return;\n   198→    }\n   199→\n   200→    // Show options\n   201→    const listText = unlinkedListings\n   202→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${l.book_title}\"`)\n   203→      .join(\"\\n\");\n   204→    await sendMessage(\n   205→      message.chat.id,\n   206→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n   207→    );\n   208→    return;\n   209→  }\n   210→\n   211→  // Handle /link_ID command\n   212→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n   213→  if (linkMatch) {\n   214→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n   215→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   216→  }\n   217→}\n   218→\n   219→/**\n   220→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n   221→ * 1. Generate an invite link\n   222→ * 2. Save it to the listing\n   223→ * 3. Notify all members\n   224→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n   225→ */\n   226→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n   227→  const listing = db\n   228→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   229→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   230→\n   231→  if (!listing) {\n   232→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n   233→    return;\n   234→  }\n   235→\n   236→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n   237→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n   238→    return;\n   239→  }\n   240→\n   241→  // Try to create an invite link\n   242→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   243→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   244→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n   245→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   246→  }\n   247→\n   248→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   249→    await sendMessage(\n   250→      chatId,\n   251→      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n   252→        \"then try again with /link\"\n   253→    );\n   254→    return;\n   255→  }\n   256→\n   257→  // Save to database\n   258→  db.prepare(\n   259→    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   260→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n   261→\n   262→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n   263→  const members = db\n   264→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   265→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   266→\n   267→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   268→  for (const member of members) {\n   269→    createNotification(\n   270→      member.user_id,\n   271→      listingId,\n   272→      \"telegram_ready\",\n   273→      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n   274→    );\n   275→  }\n   276→\n   277→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n   278→  await sendMessage(\n   279→    chatId,\n   280→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n   281→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n   282→      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n   283→  );\n   284→}\n   285→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"c35f520a-11f2-4342-9482-71117f13355b","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:01:55.325Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01D9cjRaYJdFZfTgMPtBFQx2","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function GET(\n     8→  _req: NextRequest,\n     9→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    10→) {\n    11→  const { id } = await params;\n    12→\n    13→  const listing = db\n    14→    .prepare(\n    15→      `SELECT\n    16→        l.*,\n    17→        u.display_name as author_name\n    18→      FROM listings l\n    19→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    20→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    21→    )\n    22→    .get(id) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  const members = db\n    29→    .prepare(\n    30→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    31→       FROM listing_members lm\n    32→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    33→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    34→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    35→    )\n    36→    .all(id) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    37→\n    38→  const session = await getSession();\n    39→  const isMember = session.userId\n    40→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    41→    : false;\n    42→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    43→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    44→    : false;\n    45→\n    46→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    47→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    48→    return NextResponse.json(\n    49→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    50→      { status: 404 }\n    51→    );\n    52→  }\n    53→\n    54→  // Check if the current user has a pending application\n    55→  let hasApplied = false;\n    56→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    57→  if (session.userId && !isMember && listing.requires_approval) {\n    58→    const app = db\n    59→      .prepare(\n    60→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    61→      )\n    62→      .get(id, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    63→    if (app) {\n    64→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    65→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    66→    }\n    67→  }\n    68→\n    69→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    70→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    71→  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    72→    pendingApplicants = db\n    73→      .prepare(\n    74→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    75→         FROM listing_applications la\n    76→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    77→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    78→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    79→      )\n    80→      .all(id) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    81→  }\n    82→\n    83→  return NextResponse.json({\n    84→    listing: {\n    85→      ...listing,\n    86→      members,\n    87→      memberCount: members.length,\n    88→      isMember,\n    89→      isAuthor,\n    90→      hasApplied,\n    91→      applicationStatus,\n    92→      pendingApplicants,\n    93→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n    94→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    95→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    96→    },\n    97→  });\n    98→}\n    99→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"0004fb26-9872-44c3-aba6-a7d4449f36cc","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:01:55.353Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a0167aa97356b7a54","tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","description":"Reading app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":23910,"tool_uses":15,"duration_ms":10493},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"7f30f6ab-72f9-4e1d-b553-7de1b3dcbf1a","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01SYMpfAAvwe3VHPfdEYnNQH","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01TtBzuhPhvoPyjsAyx6JeX5","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":7,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4723,"cache_read_input_tokens":19122,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4723,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":4,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"4c46e13d-a699-4eac-ba1e-38d74f1bd664"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01TtBzuhPhvoPyjsAyx6JeX5","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createTextChannel,\n     5→  createChannelInvite,\n     6→  sendChannelMessage,\n     7→} from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     8→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     9→\n    10→/**\n    11→ * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n    12→ *\n    13→ * This endpoint handles:\n    14→ * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n    15→ *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n    16→ *\n    17→ * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n    18→ * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n    19→ * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n    20→ */\n    21→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    22→  // Verify webhook secret if configured\n    23→  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    24→  if (webhookSecret) {\n    25→    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    26→    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    27→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    28→    }\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  try {\n    32→    const body = await req.json();\n    33→    const { type } = body;\n    34→\n    35→    if (type === \"link\") {\n    36→      return handleLink(body);\n    37→    }\n    38→\n    39→    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    40→    if (type === 1) {\n    41→      // PING - respond with PONG\n    42→      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    43→    }\n    44→\n    45→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n    46→  } catch (err) {\n    47→    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    48→    return NextResponse.json(\n    49→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    50→      { status: 500 }\n    51→    );\n    52→  }\n    53→}\n    54→\n    55→async function handleLink(body: {\n    56→  guildId: string;\n    57→  listingId: number;\n    58→  channelId?: string;\n    59→}) {\n    60→  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n    61→\n    62→  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    63→    return NextResponse.json(\n    64→      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n    65→      { status: 400 }\n    66→    );\n    67→  }\n    68→\n    69→  const listing = db\n    70→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    71→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    72→\n    73→  if (!listing) {\n    74→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    75→  }\n    76→\n    77→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    78→    return NextResponse.json(\n    79→      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n    80→      { status: 400 }\n    81→    );\n    82→  }\n    83→\n    84→  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n    85→\n    86→  // If no channel specified, create one\n    87→  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    88→    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    89→    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n    90→      .toLowerCase()\n    91→      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n    92→      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n    93→\n    94→    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n    95→      guildId,\n    96→      channelName,\n    97→      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n    98→    );\n    99→\n   100→    if (!channel) {\n   101→      return NextResponse.json(\n   102→        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n   103→        { status: 500 }\n   104→      );\n   105→    }\n   106→\n   107→    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n   108→  }\n   109→\n   110→  // Create invite link\n   111→  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n   112→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   113→    return NextResponse.json(\n   114→      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n   115→      { status: 500 }\n   116→    );\n   117→  }\n   118→\n   119→  // Save to DB\n   120→  db.prepare(\n   121→    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   122→  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n   123→\n   124→  // Notify all members\n   125→  const members = db\n   126→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   127→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   128→\n   129→  for (const member of members) {\n   130→    createNotification(\n   131→      member.user_id,\n   132→      listingId,\n   133→      \"discord_ready\",\n   134→      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n   135→    );\n   136→  }\n   137→\n   138→  // Send welcome message to the channel\n   139→  await sendChannelMessage(\n   140→    targetChannelId,\n   141→    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n   142→      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n   143→      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n   144→      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n   145→      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n   146→  );\n   147→\n   148→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n   149→}\n   150→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"2e45e790-d8a7-43ca-900b-e3d08dc830ca","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:01:55.404Z"}

members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    41→    : false;\n    42→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    43→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    44→    : false;\n    45→\n    46→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    47→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    48→    return NextResponse.json(\n    49→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    50→      { status: 404 }\n    51→    );\n    52→  }\n    53→\n    54→  // Check if the current user has a pending application\n    55→  let hasApplied = false;\n    56→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    57→  if (session.userId && !isMember && listing.requires_approval) {\n    58→    const app = db\n    59→      .prepare(\n    60→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    61→      )\n    62→      .get(id, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    63→    if (app) {\n    64→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    65→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    66→    }\n    67→  }\n    68→\n    69→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    70→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    71→  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    72→    pendingApplicants = db\n    73→      .prepare(\n    74→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    75→         FROM listing_applications la\n    76→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    77→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    78→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    79→      )\n    80→      .all(id) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    81→  }\n    82→\n    83→  return NextResponse.json({\n    84→    listing: {\n    85→      ...listing,\n    86→      members,\n    87→      memberCount: members.length,\n    88→      isMember,\n    89→      isAuthor,\n    90→      hasApplied,\n    91→      applicationStatus,\n    92→      pendingApplicants,\n    93→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n    94→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    95→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    96→    },\n    97→  });\n    98→}\n    99→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"35093552-15f4-4e36-a5cd-c0cbabb8d10b","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:01:55.706Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Cw5Qay6VNP7waWhj9HU23p","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→\n    17→  const listing = db\n    18→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    19→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    20→\n    21→  if (!listing) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n    28→      { status: 403 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n    33→\n    34→  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\")) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/...)\" },\n    37→      { status: 400 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    42→    telegramLink.trim(),\n    43→    listingId\n    44→  );\n    45→\n    46→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    47→}\n    48→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"8161eb4c-8aee-416f-ab38-3105d588d591","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:01:55.823Z"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QJTzZvobRohCeXk1WktK4t","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→\n     4→export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n     5→  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n     6→\n     7→  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n     8→  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n     9→  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n    10→  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n    11→  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n    12→\n    13→  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n    14→  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n    15→\n    16→  if (q) {\n    17→    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    18→    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    22→    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    23→    params.push(meetingFormat);\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  if (readingPace) {\n    27→    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    28→    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  if (startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom)) {\n    32→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    33→    params.push(startDateFrom);\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n    37→\n    38→  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n    39→  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n    40→  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n    41→\n    42→  const listings = db\n    43→    .prepare(\n    44→      `SELECT\n    45→        l.*,\n    46→        u.display_name as author_name,\n    47→        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    48→      FROM listings l\n    49→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    50→      WHERE ${whereClause}\n    51→      ORDER BY ${orderClause}`\n    52→    )\n    53→    .all(...params);\n    54→\n    55→  return NextResponse.json({ listings });\n    56→}\n    57→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"fe26bb4a-c9ee-4e54-8168-16c66e053d05","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:01:55.804Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a40b2efc5e4496fbb","tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","description":"Reading app/api/auth/register/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":17807,"tool_uses":11,"duration_ms":13908},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"19a01f64-4add-466a-97d1-f42b3a12308e","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_013qRxhFuKpXSTFwSjVQqZ6d","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01MEknadE7wfB2QtxXZJa6rq","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/register/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":5104,"cache_read_input_tokens":12526,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":5104,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"0df25650-509c-4d82-962f-ccf4092f93a2"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01MEknadE7wfB2QtxXZJa6rq","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  try {\n     8→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n     9→\n    10→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    11→      return NextResponse.json(\n    12→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    13→        { status: 400 }\n    14→      );\n    15→    }\n    16→\n    17→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    18→      return NextResponse.json(\n    19→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    20→        { status: 400 }\n    21→      );\n    22→    }\n    23→\n    24→    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    25→    if (password.length > 72) {\n    26→      return NextResponse.json(\n    27→        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n    28→        { status: 400 }\n    29→      );\n    30→    }\n    31→\n    32→    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    33→      return NextResponse.json(\n    34→        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n    35→        { status: 400 }\n    36→      );\n    37→    }\n    38→\n    39→    if (email.length > 254) {\n    40→      return NextResponse.json(\n    41→        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n    42→        { status: 400 }\n    43→      );\n    44→    }\n    45→\n    46→    // Check if email is already taken\n    47→    const existing = db\n    48→      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    49→      .get(email);\n    50→    if (existing) {\n    51→      return NextResponse.json(\n    52→        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n    53→        { status: 409 }\n    54→      );\n    55→    }\n    56→\n    57→    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n    58→\n    59→    const result = db\n    60→      .prepare(\n    61→        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n    62→      )\n    63→      .run(email.toLowerCase().trim(), passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n    64→\n    65→    // Auto-login after registration\n    66→    const session = await getSession();\n    67→    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    68→    session.email = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    69→    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    70→    await session.save();\n    71→\n    72→    return NextResponse.json(\n    73→      {\n    74→        user: {\n    75→          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n    76→          email: email.toLowerCase().trim(),\n    77→          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n    78→        },\n    79→      },\n    80→      { status: 201 }\n    81→    );\n    82→  } catch (error) {\n    83→    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n    84→    return NextResponse.json(\n    85→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    86→      { status: 500 }\n    87→    );\n    88→  }\n    89→}\n    90→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"331fa6ee-40f6-4d30-8832-29b4fd0bee2e","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:01:56.239Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_013qRxhFuKpXSTFwSjVQqZ6d","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01KPzLierVzTbJDpBjhGaFP1","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/login/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":5104,"cache_read_input_tokens":12526,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":5104,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"131c792a-7774-4b55-97ff-b6c76c69c7be"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KPzLierVzTbJDpBjhGaFP1","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  try {\n     8→    const { email, password } = await req.json();\n     9→\n    10→    if (!email || !password) {\n    11→      return NextResponse.json(\n    12→        { error: \"Email and password are required\" },\n    13→        { status: 400 }\n    14→      );\n    15→    }\n    16→\n    17→    const user = db\n    18→      .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    19→      .get(email.toLowerCase().trim()) as\n    20→      | { id: number; email: string; password_hash: string; display_name: string }\n    21→      | undefined;\n    22→\n    23→    if (!user) {\n    24→      return NextResponse.json(\n    25→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    26→        { status: 401 }\n    27→      );\n    28→    }\n    29→\n    30→    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\n    31→    if (!valid) {\n    32→      return NextResponse.json(\n    33→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    34→        { status: 401 }\n    35→      );\n    36→    }\n    37→\n    38→    const session = await getSession();\n    39→    session.userId = user.id;\n    40→    session.email = user.email;\n    41→    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    42→    await session.save();\n    43→\n    44→    return NextResponse.json({\n    45→      user: {\n    46→        id: user.id,\n    47→        email: user.email,\n    48→        displayName: user.display_name,\n    49→      },\n    50→    });\n    51→  } catch (error) {\n    52→    console.error(\"Login error:\", error);\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    55→      { status: 500 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→}\n    59→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"5450f73e-cfda-41c0-91a6-366348fde35c","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:01:56.475Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01EuLSo6FiPpZ5bLAVmAik96","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_017AWGTs8mt3b352PCYGkezE","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/ratings/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":7,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7578,"cache_read_input_tokens":23845,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":7578,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"ca9289da-227c-478d-a023-db6e80f7b534"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017AWGTs8mt3b352PCYGkezE","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listingId || !ratedUserId || !score) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    46→      { status: 400 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n    53→      { status: 400 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    58→  const listing = db\n    59→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    60→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    61→\n    62→  if (!listing) {\n    63→    return NextResponse.json(\n    64→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    65→      { status: 404 }\n    66→    );\n    67→  }\n    68→\n    69→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    70→    return NextResponse.json(\n    71→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    72→      { status: 400 }\n    73→    );\n    74→  }\n    75→\n    76→  // Verify both users are members\n    77→  const raterMember = db\n    78→    .prepare(\n    79→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    80→    )\n    81→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    82→\n    83→  if (!raterMember) {\n    84→    return NextResponse.json(\n    85→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n    86→      { status: 403 }\n    87→    );\n    88→  }\n    89→\n    90→  const ratedMember = db\n    91→    .prepare(\n    92→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    93→    )\n    94→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n    95→\n    96→  if (!ratedMember) {\n    97→    return NextResponse.json(\n    98→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n    99→      { status: 400 }\n   100→    );\n   101→  }\n   102→\n   103→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   104→  const existing = db\n   105→    .prepare(\n   106→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   107→    )\n   108→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   109→\n   110→  if (existing) {\n   111→    db.prepare(\n   112→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   113→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   114→  } else {\n   115→    db.prepare(\n   116→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   117→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   118→\n   119→    // Notify the rated user\n   120→    createNotification(\n   121→      ratedUserId,\n   122→      listingId,\n   123→      \"rating_received\",\n   124→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   125→    );\n   126→  }\n   127→\n   128→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   129→}\n   130→\n   131→/**\n   132→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   133→ *\n   134→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   135→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   136→ */\n   137→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   138→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   139→  if (!session) {\n   140→    return NextResponse.json(\n   141→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   142→      { status: 401 }\n   143→    );\n   144→  }\n   145→\n   146→  const listingId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   147→  if (!listingId) {\n   148→    return NextResponse.json(\n   149→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   150→      { status: 400 }\n   151→    );\n   152→  }\n   153→\n   154→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   155→  const givenRatings = db\n   156→    .prepare(\n   157→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   158→       FROM ratings r\n   159→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   160→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   161→    )\n   162→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   163→      rated_user_id: number;\n   164→      score: number;\n   165→      comment: string;\n   166→      display_name: string;\n   167→    }[];\n   168→\n   169→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   170→  const receivedRatings = db\n   171→    .prepare(\n   172→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   173→       FROM ratings r\n   174→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   175→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   176→    )\n   177→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   178→      rater_id: number;\n   179→      score: number;\n   180→      comment: string;\n   181→      display_name: string;\n   182→    }[];\n   183→\n   184→  return NextResponse.json({\n   185→    givenRatings,\n   186→    receivedRatings,\n   187→  });\n   188→}\n   189→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"7e3b04f4-ad03-4383-8537-7b88f1ab8e91","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:01:57.885Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HmDrWFmPkDAZvUfSRcgDNw","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function PATCH(\n     7→  req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    20→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    21→\n    22→  if (!listing) {\n    23→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n    28→  }\n    29→\n    30→  const body = await req.json();\n    31→  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n    32→\n    33→  if (!applicationId || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    34→    return NextResponse.json(\n    35→      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n    36→      { status: 400 }\n    37→    );\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n    41→  const application = db\n    42→    .prepare(\n    43→      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    46→\n    47→  if (!application) {\n    48→    return NextResponse.json(\n    49→      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n    50→      { status: 404 }\n    51→    );\n    52→  }\n    53→\n    54→  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n    55→\n    56→  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    57→    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    58→    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    59→      // Check if group is already full\n    60→      const { count } = db\n    61→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    62→        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    63→\n    64→      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    65→        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n    66→      }\n    67→\n    68→      // Update application status\n    69→      db.prepare(\n    70→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    71→      ).run(applicationId);\n    72→\n    73→      // Add to members\n    74→      db.prepare(\n    75→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    76→      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n    77→\n    78→      // Check if group is now full\n    79→      const newCount = count + 1;\n    80→      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    81→        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    82→        return { isFull: true };\n    83→      }\n    84→      return { isFull: false };\n    85→    });\n    86→\n    87→    try {\n    88→      const result = approveTransaction();\n    89→\n    90→      notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n    91→\n    92→      if (result.isFull) {\n    93→        notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n    94→        // Reject remaining pending applications\n    95→        const pendingApps = db\n    96→          .prepare(\n    97→            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    98→          )\n    99→          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n   100→\n   101→        for (const app of pendingApps) {\n   102→          db.prepare(\n   103→            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   104→          ).run(app.id);\n   105→          notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   106→        }\n   107→      }\n   108→\n   109→      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   110→    } catch (err) {\n   111→      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n   112→      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n   113→    }\n   114→  } else {\n   115→    // Reject\n   116→    db.prepare(\n   117→      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   118→    ).run(applicationId);\n   119→\n   120→    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   121→\n   122→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   123→  }\n   124→}\n   125→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"9956bc95-5701-4f5c-b202-0cb92be16a75","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:01:58.034Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KwLQo9zaC2R7VeNz5maeEE","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→interface ReadingRow {\n     6→  id: number;\n     7→  book_title: string;\n     8→  book_author: string;\n     9→  book_cover_url: string;\n    10→  reading_pace: string;\n    11→  start_date: string;\n    12→  meeting_format: string;\n    13→  is_full: number;\n    14→  telegram_link: string;\n    15→  member_count: number;\n    16→  max_group_size: number;\n    17→  author_name: string;\n    18→  joined_at: string;\n    19→}\n    20→\n    21→export async function GET() {\n    22→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    23→  if (!session) {\n    24→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    25→  }\n    26→\n    27→  // Get all listings the user is a member of (including ones they authored)\n    28→  const readings = db.prepare(`\n    29→    SELECT\n    30→      l.id,\n    31→      l.book_title,\n    32→      l.book_author,\n    33→      l.book_cover_url,\n    34→      l.reading_pace,\n    35→      l.start_date,\n    36→      l.meeting_format,\n    37→      l.is_full,\n    38→      l.telegram_link,\n    39→      l.max_group_size,\n    40→      u.display_name as author_name,\n    41→      lm.joined_at,\n    42→      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    43→    FROM listing_members lm\n    44→    JOIN listings l ON l.id = lm.listing_id\n    45→    JOIN users u ON u.id = l.author_id\n    46→    WHERE lm.user_id = ?\n    47→    ORDER BY lm.joined_at DESC\n    48→  `).all(session.userId) as ReadingRow[];\n    49→\n    50→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    51→\n    52→  // Currently reading: groups that are full (active) or start_date <= today\n    53→  const currentlyReading = readings.filter(\n    54→    (r) => r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today\n    55→  );\n    56→\n    57→  // Reading history: completed groups (full + start_date in the past)\n    58→  // Upcoming: not yet started and not full\n    59→  const history = readings.filter(\n    60→    (r) => r.is_full === 1 && r.start_date < today\n    61→  );\n    62→\n    63→  const upcoming = readings.filter(\n    64→    (r) => r.is_full === 0 && r.start_date > today\n    65→  );\n    66→\n    67→  const active = readings.filter(\n    68→    (r) => !history.includes(r) && !upcoming.includes(r) && (r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today)\n    69→  );\n    70→\n    71→  return NextResponse.json({\n    72→    active,\n    73→    history,\n    74→    upcoming,\n    75→    total: readings.length,\n    76→  });\n    77→}\n    78→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"e53e1ee4-b4f6-4d07-a966-dc6429f11f10","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:00.262Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_012Rv6TYyhNcFU9nNr4i3StL","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01R3Dh3gxVgPArtaE9NFHRwF","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/genres/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":7,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4158,"cache_read_input_tokens":31423,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4158,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"668021c8-1edd-4a6b-9c41-81594ebb2079"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01R3Dh3gxVgPArtaE9NFHRwF","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const AVAILABLE_GENRES = [\n     6→  \"Literary Fiction\",\n     7→  \"Science Fiction\",\n     8→  \"Fantasy\",\n     9→  \"Mystery\",\n    10→  \"Thriller\",\n    11→  \"Romance\",\n    12→  \"Historical Fiction\",\n    13→  \"Horror\",\n    14→  \"Dystopian\",\n    15→  \"Adventure\",\n    16→  \"Contemporary Fiction\",\n    17→  \"Magical Realism\",\n    18→  \"Classics\",\n    19→  \"Short Stories\",\n    20→  \"Young Adult\",\n    21→  \"Graphic Novels\",\n    22→];\n    23→\n    24→interface GenreRow {\n    25→  genre: string;\n    26→}\n    27→\n    28→export async function GET() {\n    29→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    30→  if (!session) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const userGenres = db.prepare(\n    35→    \"SELECT genre FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY genre\"\n    36→  ).all(session.userId) as GenreRow[];\n    37→\n    38→  return NextResponse.json({\n    39→    genres: userGenres.map((g) => g.genre),\n    40→    available: AVAILABLE_GENRES,\n    41→  });\n    42→}\n    43→\n    44→export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {\n    45→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    46→  if (!session) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const { genres } = await req.json();\n    51→\n    52→  if (!Array.isArray(genres)) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"genres must be an array\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Validate all genres\n    57→  const validGenres = genres.filter((g: string) => AVAILABLE_GENRES.includes(g));\n    58→\n    59→  // Replace all genres in a transaction\n    60→  const updateGenres = db.transaction(() => {\n    61→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ?\").run(session.userId);\n    62→    const insert = db.prepare(\"INSERT INTO user_genres (user_id, genre) VALUES (?, ?)\");\n    63→    for (const genre of validGenres) {\n    64→      insert.run(session.userId, genre);\n    65→    }\n    66→  });\n    67→\n    68→  updateGenres();\n    69→\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({ genres: validGenres });\n    71→}\n    72→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"d9c711e6-b5fd-4aee-99a4-ce5843ba9c26","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:00.476Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a0167aa97356b7a54","tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","description":"Reading app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":35662,"tool_uses":23,"duration_ms":15772},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"0447a830-6787-4a09-9b8b-de6006d1fc01","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_012Rv6TYyhNcFU9nNr4i3StL","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01B378T9VAd6WknfK5SvSrof","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":7,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4158,"cache_read_input_tokens":31423,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4158,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"b9ef8217-2848-4264-8d6e-47cdcb3db93b"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01B378T9VAd6WknfK5SvSrof","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n     9→ * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    13→  if (!session) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json(\n    15→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    16→      { status: 401 }\n    17→    );\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n    21→  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n    22→  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n    23→\n    24→  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json(\n    26→      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n    27→      { status: 400 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  // Average score\n    32→  const stats = db\n    33→    .prepare(\n    34→      `SELECT\n    35→        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n    36→        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n    37→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n    38→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n    39→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n    40→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n    41→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n    42→       FROM ratings\n    43→       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(userId) as {\n    46→      total_ratings: number;\n    47→      average_score: number | null;\n    48→      five_star: number;\n    49→      four_star: number;\n    50→      three_star: number;\n    51→      two_star: number;\n    52→      one_star: number;\n    53→    };\n    54→\n    55→  // Number of completed groups\n    56→  const completedGroups = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n    59→       FROM listing_members lm\n    60→       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n    61→       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    62→    )\n    63→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    64→\n    65→  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n    66→  const groupsRated = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n    69→       FROM ratings\n    70→       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    71→    )\n    72→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    73→\n    74→  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n    75→  const recentRatings = db\n    76→    .prepare(\n    77→      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n    78→       FROM ratings r\n    79→       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n    80→       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n    81→       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n    82→       LIMIT 10`\n    83→    )\n    84→    .all(userId) as {\n    85→      score: number;\n    86→      comment: string;\n    87→      created_at: string;\n    88→      book_title: string;\n    89→    }[];\n    90→\n    91→  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n    92→  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    93→    ? recentRatings\n    94→    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n    95→        score,\n    96→        created_at,\n    97→        book_title,\n    98→      }));\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    reputation: {\n   102→      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n   103→      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n   104→      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n   105→      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n   106→      breakdown: {\n   107→        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n   108→        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n   109→        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n   110→        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n   111→        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n   112→      },\n   113→      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"09cb4e50-c5a6-4690-968e-4da4038b980e","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:00.682Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015Ngjrp8RrhNXWL8yowJyDc","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateGroupDeepLink } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Returns the Telegram deep link for one-click group creation.\n    10→ * Only available to the listing author when the group is full\n    11→ * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function GET(\n    14→  _req: NextRequest,\n    15→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    16→) {\n    17→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    18→  if (!session) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    21→      { status: 401 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n    28→      { status: 404 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { id } = await params;\n    33→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    34→\n    35→  const listing = db\n    36→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    37→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    38→\n    39→  if (!listing) {\n    40→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"Only the organizer can create the Telegram group\" },\n    46→      { status: 403 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Group must be full before creating a Telegram group\" },\n    53→      { status: 400 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    58→    return NextResponse.json(\n    59→      { error: \"Telegram link already set\", telegramLink: listing.telegram_link },\n    60→      { status: 400 }\n    61→    );\n    62→  }\n    63→\n    64→  const deepLink = await generateGroupDeepLink(listingId);\n    65→  if (!deepLink) {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Failed to generate deep link. Check bot configuration.\" },\n    68→      { status: 500 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  return NextResponse.json({\n    73→    deepLink,\n    74→    instructions:\n    75→      \"Click the link to open Telegram and create a group. The bot will automatically generate an invite link for your reading group.\",\n    76→  });\n    77→}\n    78→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"025cfc80-25bd-473a-a544-858457fbabaa","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:00.953Z"}
