{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_016dwbd6D2MxGwXhpMBrmJ9Z","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listingId || !ratedUserId || !score) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    46→      { status: 400 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n    53→      { status: 400 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    58→  const listing = db\n    59→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    60→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    61→\n    62→  if (!listing) {\n    63→    return NextResponse.json(\n    64→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    65→      { status: 404 }\n    66→    );\n    67→  }\n    68→\n    69→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    70→    return NextResponse.json(\n    71→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    72→      { status: 400 }\n    73→    );\n    74→  }\n    75→\n    76→  // Verify both users are members\n    77→  const raterMember = db\n    78→    .prepare(\n    79→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    80→    )\n    81→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    82→\n    83→  if (!raterMember) {\n    84→    return NextResponse.json(\n    85→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n    86→      { status: 403 }\n    87→    );\n    88→  }\n    89→\n    90→  const ratedMember = db\n    91→    .prepare(\n    92→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    93→    )\n    94→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n    95→\n    96→  if (!ratedMember) {\n    97→    return NextResponse.json(\n    98→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n    99→      { status: 400 }\n   100→    );\n   101→  }\n   102→\n   103→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   104→  const existing = db\n   105→    .prepare(\n   106→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   107→    )\n   108→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   109→\n   110→  if (existing) {\n   111→    db.prepare(\n   112→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   113→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   114→  } else {\n   115→    db.prepare(\n   116→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   117→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   118→\n   119→    // Notify the rated user\n   120→    createNotification(\n   121→      ratedUserId,\n   122→      listingId,\n   123→      \"rating_received\",\n   124→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   125→    );\n   126→  }\n   127→\n   128→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   129→}\n   130→\n   131→/**\n   132→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   133→ *\n   134→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   135→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   136→ */\n   137→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   138→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   139→  if (!session) {\n   140→    return NextResponse.json(\n   141→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   142→      { status: 401 }\n   143→    );\n   144→  }\n   145→\n   146→  const listingId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   147→  if (!listingId) {\n   148→    return NextResponse.json(\n   149→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   150→      { status: 400 }\n   151→    );\n   152→  }\n   153→\n   154→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   155→  const givenRatings = db\n   156→    .prepare(\n   157→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   158→       FROM ratings r\n   159→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   160→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   161→    )\n   162→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   163→      rated_user_id: number;\n   164→      score: number;\n   165→      comment: string;\n   166→      display_name: string;\n   167→    }[];\n   168→\n   169→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   170→  const receivedRatings = db\n   171→    .prepare(\n   172→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   173→       FROM ratings r\n   174→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   175→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   176→    )\n   177→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   178→      rater_id: number;\n   179→      score: number;\n   180→      comment: string;\n   181→      display_name: string;\n   182→    }[];\n   183→\n   184→  return NextResponse.json({\n   185→    givenRatings,\n   186→    receivedRatings,\n   187→  });\n   188→}\n   189→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"b8cef083-7868-45af-a479-c1148252515b","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:01.710Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a40b2efc5e4496fbb","tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","description":"Reading app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":21963,"tool_uses":14,"duration_ms":19760},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"d9d2f955-7788-4afc-8b8c-2f7e531ac8da","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01AZ4Fjqo4dWNvHHWrKZaE4E","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_017WCaTyvM7noPrARMJhrkce","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4083,"cache_read_input_tokens":17630,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4083,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":24,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"270185de-4552-4066-b96f-08bc7501c967"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017WCaTyvM7noPrARMJhrkce","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\n     6→  sendMessage,\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n     8→} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     9→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    10→\n    11→/**\n    12→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n    13→ *\n    14→ * Handles two types of updates:\n    15→ *\n    16→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n    17→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n    18→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    19→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    20→ *\n    21→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    22→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n    23→ */\n    24→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    25→  // Verify webhook secret if configured\n    26→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    27→  if (webhookSecret) {\n    28→    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    29→    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    30→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→    }\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n    35→  try {\n    36→    update = await req.json();\n    37→  } catch {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n    42→  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    43→    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n    44→      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    45→    );\n    46→  }\n    47→\n    48→  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n    49→  if (update.message) {\n    50→    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n    54→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    55→}\n    56→\n    57→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\n    58→  chat: {\n    59→    id: number;\n    60→    title?: string;\n    61→    type: string;\n    62→  };\n    63→  from: {\n    64→    id: number;\n    65→    first_name: string;\n    66→  };\n    67→  new_chat_member: {\n    68→    user: {\n    69→      id: number;\n    70→      is_bot: boolean;\n    71→    };\n    72→    status: string;\n    73→  };\n    74→}\n    75→\n    76→interface TelegramMessage {\n    77→  chat: {\n    78→    id: number;\n    79→    type: string;\n    80→    title?: string;\n    81→  };\n    82→  text?: string;\n    83→  from?: {\n    84→    id: number;\n    85→  };\n    86→}\n    87→\n    88→/**\n    89→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n    90→ *\n    91→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n    92→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n    93→ * 1. Creates the group\n    94→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n    95→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n    96→ *\n    97→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n    98→ */\n    99→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n   100→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n   101→\n   102→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n   103→  if (\n   104→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n   105→    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n   106→  ) {\n   107→    return;\n   108→  }\n   109→\n   110→  // Only process group chats\n   111→  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n   112→    return;\n   113→  }\n   114→\n   115→  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n   116→  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n   117→  const pending = db\n   118→    .prepare(\n   119→      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n   120→    )\n   121→    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n   122→\n   123→  if (pending) {\n   124→    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n   125→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n   126→      chat.id\n   127→    );\n   128→    return;\n   129→  }\n   130→\n   131→  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n   132→  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n   133→  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n   134→  await sendMessage(\n   135→    chat.id,\n   136→    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n   137→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n   138→      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n   139→  );\n   140→\n   141→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n   142→  try {\n   143→    db.prepare(\n   144→      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n   145→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n   146→  } catch {\n   147→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n   148→  }\n   149→}\n   150→\n   151→/**\n   152→ * Handle messages in group chats.\n   153→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n   154→ */\n   155→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n   156→  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n   157→    return;\n   158→  }\n   159→\n   160→  const text = message.text.trim();\n   161→\n   162→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n   163→  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n   164→    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n   165→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n   166→    if (listingId) {\n   167→      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   168→      return;\n   169→    }\n   170→  }\n   171→\n   172→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n   173→  if (text === \"/link\") {\n   174→    // Find the most recent full listing without a telegram link\n   175→    // that was authored by someone (we can't verify Telegram user = Bookmate user\n   176→    // without account linking, so we just report available listings)\n   177→    const unlinkedListings = db\n   178→      .prepare(\n   179→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n   180→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n   181→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n   182→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n   183→      )\n   184→      .all() as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n   185→\n   186→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n   187→      await sendMessage(\n   188→        message.chat.id,\n   189→        \"No unlinked reading groups found. The group may already be set up!\"\n   190→      );\n   191→      return;\n   192→    }\n   193→\n   194→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n   195→      // Auto-link the only available listing\n   196→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n   197→      return;\n   198→    }\n   199→\n   200→    // Show options\n   201→    const listText = unlinkedListings\n   202→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${l.book_title}\"`)\n   203→      .join(\"\\n\");\n   204→    await sendMessage(\n   205→      message.chat.id,\n   206→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n   207→    );\n   208→    return;\n   209→  }\n   210→\n   211→  // Handle /link_ID command\n   212→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n   213→  if (linkMatch) {\n   214→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n   215→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   216→  }\n   217→}\n   218→\n   219→/**\n   220→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n   221→ * 1. Generate an invite link\n   222→ * 2. Save it to the listing\n   223→ * 3. Notify all members\n   224→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n   225→ */\n   226→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n   227→  const listing = db\n   228→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   229→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   230→\n   231→  if (!listing) {\n   232→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n   233→    return;\n   234→  }\n   235→\n   236→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n   237→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n   238→    return;\n   239→  }\n   240→\n   241→  // Try to create an invite link\n   242→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   243→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   244→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n   245→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   246→  }\n   247→\n   248→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   249→    await sendMessage(\n   250→      chatId,\n   251→      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n   252→        \"then try again with /link\"\n   253→    );\n   254→    return;\n   255→  }\n   256→\n   257→  // Save to database\n   258→  db.prepare(\n   259→    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   260→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n   261→\n   262→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n   263→  const members = db\n   264→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   265→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   266→\n   267→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   268→  for (const member of members) {\n   269→    createNotification(\n   270→      member.user_id,\n   271→      listingId,\n   272→      \"telegram_ready\",\n   273→      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n   274→    );\n   275→  }\n   276→\n   277→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n   278→  await sendMessage(\n   279→    chatId,\n   280→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n   281→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n   282→      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n   283→  );\n   284→}\n   285→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"05a9d8d7-0b55-404d-af37-dd51550273e6","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:02.090Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01PLvQQvLhkQqZ5EdXYdFhT8","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01JBnUGBre3pdmMXUBHv8xMR","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/auto-discord/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":7,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4455,"cache_read_input_tokens":35581,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4455,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":5,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"96e66a6c-189f-40e7-bac5-45d0b60a34c8"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Xjp2mPe8waXqkGy44yvu7Y","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createTextChannel,\n     5→  createChannelInvite,\n     6→  sendChannelMessage,\n     7→} from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     8→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     9→\n    10→/**\n    11→ * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n    12→ *\n    13→ * This endpoint handles:\n    14→ * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n    15→ *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n    16→ *\n    17→ * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n    18→ * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n    19→ * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n    20→ */\n    21→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    22→  // Verify webhook secret if configured\n    23→  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    24→  if (webhookSecret) {\n    25→    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    26→    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    27→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    28→    }\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  try {\n    32→    const body = await req.json();\n    33→    const { type } = body;\n    34→\n    35→    if (type === \"link\") {\n    36→      return handleLink(body);\n    37→    }\n    38→\n    39→    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    40→    if (type === 1) {\n    41→      // PING - respond with PONG\n    42→      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    43→    }\n    44→\n    45→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n    46→  } catch (err) {\n    47→    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    48→    return NextResponse.json(\n    49→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    50→      { status: 500 }\n    51→    );\n    52→  }\n    53→}\n    54→\n    55→async function handleLink(body: {\n    56→  guildId: string;\n    57→  listingId: number;\n    58→  channelId?: string;\n    59→}) {\n    60→  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n    61→\n    62→  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    63→    return NextResponse.json(\n    64→      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n    65→      { status: 400 }\n    66→    );\n    67→  }\n    68→\n    69→  const listing = db\n    70→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    71→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    72→\n    73→  if (!listing) {\n    74→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    75→  }\n    76→\n    77→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    78→    return NextResponse.json(\n    79→      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n    80→      { status: 400 }\n    81→    );\n    82→  }\n    83→\n    84→  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n    85→\n    86→  // If no channel specified, create one\n    87→  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    88→    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    89→    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n    90→      .toLowerCase()\n    91→      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n    92→      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n    93→\n    94→    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n    95→      guildId,\n    96→      channelName,\n    97→      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n    98→    );\n    99→\n   100→    if (!channel) {\n   101→      return NextResponse.json(\n   102→        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n   103→        { status: 500 }\n   104→      );\n   105→    }\n   106→\n   107→    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n   108→  }\n   109→\n   110→  // Create invite link\n   111→  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n   112→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   113→    return NextResponse.json(\n   114→      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n   115→      { status: 500 }\n   116→    );\n   117→  }\n   118→\n   119→  // Save to DB\n   120→  db.prepare(\n   121→    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   122→  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n   123→\n   124→  // Notify all members\n   125→  const members = db\n   126→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   127→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   128→\n   129→  for (const member of members) {\n   130→    createNotification(\n   131→      member.user_id,\n   132→      listingId,\n   133→      \"discord_ready\",\n   134→      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n   135→    );\n   136→  }\n   137→\n   138→  // Send welcome message to the channel\n   139→  await sendChannelMessage(\n   140→    targetChannelId,\n   141→    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n   142→      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n   143→      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n   144→      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n   145→      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n   146→  );\n   147→\n   148→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n   149→}\n   150→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"786abb8f-3140-46ed-be29-69c0e9e980b4","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:02.479Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01JUbC1GPmVp7h7r5EHXT9tD","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const notifications = db\n    12→    .prepare(\n    13→      `SELECT n.*, l.book_title\n    14→       FROM notifications n\n    15→       LEFT JOIN listings l ON n.listing_id = l.id\n    16→       WHERE n.user_id = ?\n    17→       ORDER BY n.created_at DESC\n    18→       LIMIT 50`\n    19→    )\n    20→    .all(session.userId);\n    21→\n    22→  const unreadCount = db\n    23→    .prepare(\n    24→      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\"\n    25→    )\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    notifications,\n    30→    unreadCount: unreadCount.count,\n    31→  });\n    32→}\n    33→\n    34→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n    35→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    36→  if (!session) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  const { notificationId } = await req.json();\n    41→\n    42→  if (notificationId) {\n    43→    db.prepare(\n    44→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    45→    ).run(notificationId, session.userId);\n    46→  } else {\n    47→    // Mark all as read\n    48→    db.prepare(\n    49→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = ?\"\n    50→    ).run(session.userId);\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    54→}\n    55→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"0babc921-2873-432a-94e2-0b8546f2c412","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:02.581Z"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01JBnUGBre3pdmMXUBHv8xMR","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateBotInviteUrl } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await getSession();\n    11→  if (!session.userId) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json(\n    13→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    14→      { status: 401 }\n    15→    );\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Discord bot is not configured\" },\n    21→      { status: 503 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  const { id } = await params;\n    26→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    27→\n    28→  const listing = db\n    29→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    30→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    31→\n    32→  if (!listing) {\n    33→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set up the Discord group\" },\n    39→      { status: 403 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"The group is not full yet\" },\n    46→      { status: 400 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"A Discord link has already been set\" },\n    53→      { status: 400 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  const inviteUrl = generateBotInviteUrl(listingId);\n    58→\n    59→  return NextResponse.json({\n    60→    inviteUrl,\n    61→    instructions:\n    62→      \"Click the link to add the Bookmate bot to your Discord server. \" +\n    63→      \"The bot will create a reading group channel and generate an invite link for your members.\",\n    64→  });\n    65→}\n    66→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"82205fa1-c945-47d0-9d05-9b029ee736c3","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:02.511Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019c5L9mVHrMUPG5k5sSZhFz","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→\n    17→  const listing = db\n    18→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    19→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    20→\n    21→  if (!listing) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n    28→      { status: 403 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n    33→\n    34→  if (\n    35→    !discordLink ||\n    36→    !(\n    37→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n    38→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    39→    )\n    40→  ) {\n    41→    return NextResponse.json(\n    42→      {\n    43→        error:\n    44→          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/...)\",\n    45→      },\n    46→      { status: 400 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    51→    discordLink.trim(),\n    52→    listingId\n    53→  );\n    54→\n    55→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    56→}\n    57→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"66a9dfe2-389e-47bb-b001-63b2c9fe24b9","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:02.705Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01PLvQQvLhkQqZ5EdXYdFhT8","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Ma7hMkQw7xtChBmNnYnuZc","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/setup/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":7,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4455,"cache_read_input_tokens":35581,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4455,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":5,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"2432d6d2-aa21-46ad-8676-5ab6391402ea"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Ma7hMkQw7xtChBmNnYnuZc","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     3→\n     4→/**\n     5→ * POST /api/telegram/setup\n     6→ *\n     7→ * Sets up the Telegram webhook. Should be called once after deployment.\n     8→ * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n     9→ *\n    10→ * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n    11→ */\n    12→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    13→  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n    14→  if (!setupSecret) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json(\n    16→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n    17→      { status: 500 }\n    18→    );\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const body = await req.json();\n    22→  if (body.secret !== setupSecret) {\n    23→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json(\n    28→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n    29→      { status: 500 }\n    30→    );\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n    34→  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n    37→      { status: 500 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    42→  if (!bot) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json(\n    44→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    45→      { status: 500 }\n    46→    );\n    47→  }\n    48→\n    49→  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n    50→  if (!success) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n    53→      { status: 500 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({\n    58→    ok: true,\n    59→    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    60→    webhookUrl,\n    61→  });\n    62→}\n    63→\n    64→/**\n    65→ * GET /api/telegram/setup\n    66→ *\n    67→ * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n    68→ */\n    69→export async function GET() {\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({\n    71→    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    72→    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n    73→  });\n    74→}\n    75→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"f6b2f29c-d9b3-40a2-bf07-4c833798eff4","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:02.913Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Uos9TtjM2BocKP6K57rqsE","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     3→\n     4→/**\n     5→ * Discord bot setup endpoint.\n     6→ * Returns bot info and invite URL for verification.\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Protected by DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET env var.\n     9→ */\n    10→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    11→  const { secret } = await req.json();\n    12→  const setupSecret = process.env.DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET || \"\";\n    13→\n    14→  if (!setupSecret || secret !== setupSecret) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json(\n    16→      { error: \"Invalid setup secret\" },\n    17→      { status: 403 }\n    18→    );\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json(\n    23→      {\n    24→        error:\n    25→          \"Discord bot is not configured. Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID environment variables.\",\n    26→      },\n    27→      { status: 503 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  const botInfo = await getBotInfo();\n    32→  if (!botInfo) {\n    33→    return NextResponse.json(\n    34→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Discord API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    35→      { status: 500 }\n    36→    );\n    37→  }\n    38→\n    39→  return NextResponse.json({\n    40→    ok: true,\n    41→    bot: {\n    42→      id: botInfo.id,\n    43→      username: botInfo.username,\n    44→    },\n    45→    message: `Discord bot \"${botInfo.username}\" is configured and ready.`,\n    46→  });\n    47→}\n    48→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"a29f9ae9-b5d0-4295-8b1e-f1e41b5cef3c","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:03.164Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01RyzjGbLqmfr4EsMdgX1HPf","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    26→    displayName.trim(),\n    27→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    28→    session.userId\n    29→  );\n    30→\n    31→  // Update session\n    32→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    33→  await session.save();\n    34→\n    35→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    36→}\n    37→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"5fc817bb-d6f6-44a9-835d-2692b5b18e18","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:04.828Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_018wjqyxkXhW386UYCYRTzXW","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01SxyhBVeuAtBSqmq2rNQbLV","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":8452,"cache_read_input_tokens":21713,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":8452,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":24,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"f7268c5d-ba0e-4900-a655-8060cc44886f"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01SxyhBVeuAtBSqmq2rNQbLV","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n     9→ * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    13→  if (!session) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json(\n    15→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    16→      { status: 401 }\n    17→    );\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n    21→  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n    22→  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n    23→\n    24→  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json(\n    26→      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n    27→      { status: 400 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  // Average score\n    32→  const stats = db\n    33→    .prepare(\n    34→      `SELECT\n    35→        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n    36→        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n    37→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n    38→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n    39→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n    40→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n    41→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n    42→       FROM ratings\n    43→       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(userId) as {\n    46→      total_ratings: number;\n    47→      average_score: number | null;\n    48→      five_star: number;\n    49→      four_star: number;\n    50→      three_star: number;\n    51→      two_star: number;\n    52→      one_star: number;\n    53→    };\n    54→\n    55→  // Number of completed groups\n    56→  const completedGroups = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n    59→       FROM listing_members lm\n    60→       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n    61→       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    62→    )\n    63→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    64→\n    65→  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n    66→  const groupsRated = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n    69→       FROM ratings\n    70→       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    71→    )\n    72→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    73→\n    74→  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n    75→  const recentRatings = db\n    76→    .prepare(\n    77→      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n    78→       FROM ratings r\n    79→       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n    80→       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n    81→       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n    82→       LIMIT 10`\n    83→    )\n    84→    .all(userId) as {\n    85→      score: number;\n    86→      comment: string;\n    87→      created_at: string;\n    88→      book_title: string;\n    89→    }[];\n    90→\n    91→  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n    92→  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    93→    ? recentRatings\n    94→    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n    95→        score,\n    96→        created_at,\n    97→        book_title,\n    98→      }));\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    reputation: {\n   102→      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n   103→      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n   104→      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n   105→      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n   106→      breakdown: {\n   107→        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n   108→        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n   109→        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n   110→        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n   111→        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n   112→      },\n   113→      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"1204e95b-334a-4bff-938a-e8cd0e9732b8","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:05.336Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01B4QqoRMkPgePnUhH8sj9Qd","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→{\n     2→  \"name\": \"bookmate\",\n     3→  \"version\": \"0.1.0\",\n     4→  \"private\": true,\n     5→  \"scripts\": {\n     6→    \"dev\": \"next dev --port 3000\",\n     7→    \"build\": \"next build\",\n     8→    \"start\": \"next start\",\n     9→    \"lint\": \"next lint\"\n    10→  },\n    11→  \"dependencies\": {\n    12→    \"@tailwindcss/postcss\": \"^4.2.2\",\n    13→    \"@types/node\": \"^25.5.0\",\n    14→    \"@types/react\": \"^19.2.14\",\n    15→    \"bcryptjs\": \"^3.0.3\",\n    16→    \"better-sqlite3\": \"^12.8.0\",\n    17→    \"cookie\": \"^1.1.1\",\n    18→    \"iron-session\": \"^8.0.4\",\n    19→    \"next\": \"^15.5.14\",\n    20→    \"nodemailer\": \"^8.0.3\",\n    21→    \"postcss\": \"^8.5.8\",\n    22→    \"react\": \"^19.2.4\",\n    23→    \"react-dom\": \"^19.2.4\",\n    24→    \"tailwindcss\": \"^4.2.2\",\n    25→    \"typescript\": \"^5.9.3\"\n    26→  },\n    27→  \"devDependencies\": {\n    28→    \"@types/bcryptjs\": \"^2.4.6\",\n    29→    \"@types/better-sqlite3\": \"^7.6.13\",\n    30→    \"@types/nodemailer\": \"^7.0.11\"\n    31→  }\n    32→}\n    33→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014gwJmhsaHFsvNC4nXCKap9","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"fc973fe9-7d38-4ac0-93e9-a4f655bfe79d","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:05.535Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_013wJpyi8L6pvLatHUbZYnT5","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→\n    17→  const listing = db\n    18→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    19→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    20→\n    21→  if (!listing) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n    28→      { status: 403 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n    33→\n    34→  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\")) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/...)\" },\n    37→      { status: 400 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    42→    telegramLink.trim(),\n    43→    listingId\n    44→  );\n    45→\n    46→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    47→}\n    48→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"21656320-2fe7-4153-af44-34cc1fc287a6","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:05.979Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KnVNZ3AfpT7Dyqw1DDoe3W","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→\n    17→  const listing = db\n    18→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    19→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    20→\n    21→  if (!listing) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n    28→      { status: 403 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n    33→\n    34→  if (\n    35→    !discordLink ||\n    36→    !(\n    37→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n    38→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    39→    )\n    40→  ) {\n    41→    return NextResponse.json(\n    42→      {\n    43→        error:\n    44→          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/...)\",\n    45→      },\n    46→      { status: 400 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    51→    discordLink.trim(),\n    52→    listingId\n    53→  );\n    54→\n    55→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    56→}\n    57→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"49f9550c-c8ea-4b43-aa12-91e62187f0f1","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:06.246Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KtJxCX3qzkGqCx5LZ5jVtd","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateGroupDeepLink } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Returns the Telegram deep link for one-click group creation.\n    10→ * Only available to the listing author when the group is full\n    11→ * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function GET(\n    14→  _req: NextRequest,\n    15→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    16→) {\n    17→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    18→  if (!session) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    21→      { status: 401 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n    28→      { status: 404 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { id } = await params;\n    33→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    34→\n    35→  const listing = db\n    36→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    37→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    38→\n    39→  if (!listing) {\n    40→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"Only the organizer can create the Telegram group\" },\n    46→      { status: 403 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Group must be full before creating a Telegram group\" },\n    53→      { status: 400 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    58→    return NextResponse.json(\n    59→      { error: \"Telegram link already set\", telegramLink: listing.telegram_link },\n    60→      { status: 400 }\n    61→    );\n    62→  }\n    63→\n    64→  const deepLink = await generateGroupDeepLink(listingId);\n    65→  if (!deepLink) {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Failed to generate deep link. Check bot configuration.\" },\n    68→      { status: 500 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  return NextResponse.json({\n    73→    deepLink,\n    74→    instructions:\n    75→      \"Click the link to open Telegram and create a group. The bot will automatically generate an invite link for your reading group.\",\n    76→  });\n    77→}\n    78→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"d20a2ec2-f16c-483b-ae89-687593d538d3","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:09.094Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01RqFjBMH6smE5Hra7VRbV66","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateBotInviteUrl } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await getSession();\n    11→  if (!session.userId) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json(\n    13→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    14→      { status: 401 }\n    15→    );\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Discord bot is not configured\" },\n    21→      { status: 503 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  const { id } = await params;\n    26→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    27→\n    28→  const listing = db\n    29→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    30→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    31→\n    32→  if (!listing) {\n    33→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set up the Discord group\" },\n    39→      { status: 403 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"The group is not full yet\" },\n    46→      { status: 400 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"A Discord link has already been set\" },\n    53→      { status: 400 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  const inviteUrl = generateBotInviteUrl(listingId);\n    58→\n    59→  return NextResponse.json({\n    60→    inviteUrl,\n    61→    instructions:\n    62→      \"Click the link to add the Bookmate bot to your Discord server. \" +\n    63→      \"The bot will create a reading group channel and generate an invite link for your members.\",\n    64→  });\n    65→}\n    66→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"5f7e5b9f-fb4b-459e-bf32-60ee5835480e","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:09.471Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_018ki2kvwp5QMvEkr1ffRRvr","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const AVAILABLE_GENRES = [\n     6→  \"Literary Fiction\",\n     7→  \"Science Fiction\",\n     8→  \"Fantasy\",\n     9→  \"Mystery\",\n    10→  \"Thriller\",\n    11→  \"Romance\",\n    12→  \"Historical Fiction\",\n    13→  \"Horror\",\n    14→  \"Dystopian\",\n    15→  \"Adventure\",\n    16→  \"Contemporary Fiction\",\n    17→  \"Magical Realism\",\n    18→  \"Classics\",\n    19→  \"Short Stories\",\n    20→  \"Young Adult\",\n    21→  \"Graphic Novels\",\n    22→];\n    23→\n    24→interface GenreRow {\n    25→  genre: string;\n    26→}\n    27→\n    28→export async function GET() {\n    29→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    30→  if (!session) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const userGenres = db.prepare(\n    35→    \"SELECT genre FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY genre\"\n    36→  ).all(session.userId) as GenreRow[];\n    37→\n    38→  return NextResponse.json({\n    39→    genres: userGenres.map((g) => g.genre),\n    40→    available: AVAILABLE_GENRES,\n    41→  });\n    42→}\n    43→\n    44→export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {\n    45→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    46→  if (!session) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const { genres } = await req.json();\n    51→\n    52→  if (!Array.isArray(genres)) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"genres must be an array\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Validate all genres\n    57→  const validGenres = genres.filter((g: string) => AVAILABLE_GENRES.includes(g));\n    58→\n    59→  // Replace all genres in a transaction\n    60→  const updateGenres = db.transaction(() => {\n    61→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ?\").run(session.userId);\n    62→    const insert = db.prepare(\"INSERT INTO user_genres (user_id, genre) VALUES (?, ?)\");\n    63→    for (const genre of validGenres) {\n    64→      insert.run(session.userId, genre);\n    65→    }\n    66→  });\n    67→\n    68→  updateGenres();\n    69→\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({ genres: validGenres });\n    71→}\n    72→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"274e44e3-177d-4d58-977f-e5b872083c7a","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:09.840Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01AQcBcF5SnNBwQmTyk1Bsda","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→\n     5→interface BookResult {\n     6→  key: string;\n     7→  title: string;\n     8→  author_name?: string[];\n     9→  cover_i?: number;\n    10→}\n    11→\n    12→interface Props {\n    13→  onSelect: (book: {\n    14→    title: string;\n    15→    author: string;\n    16→    coverUrl: string;\n    17→    olid: string;\n    18→  }) => void;\n    19→}\n    20→\n    21→export default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n    22→  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    23→  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n    24→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    25→  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n    26→  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    27→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    28→\n    29→  useEffect(() => {\n    30→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    31→      if (\n    32→        containerRef.current &&\n    33→        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n    34→      ) {\n    35→        setOpen(false);\n    36→      }\n    37→    };\n    38→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    39→    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    40→  }, []);\n    41→\n    42→  useEffect(() => {\n    43→    if (query.length < 3) {\n    44→      setResults([]);\n    45→      return;\n    46→    }\n    47→\n    48→    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    49→\n    50→    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n    51→      setLoading(true);\n    52→      try {\n    53→        const res = await fetch(\n    54→          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`\n    55→        );\n    56→        const data = await res.json();\n    57→        setResults(data.docs || []);\n    58→        setOpen(true);\n    59→      } catch {\n    60→        setResults([]);\n    61→      } finally {\n    62→        setLoading(false);\n    63→      }\n    64→    }, 400);\n    65→\n    66→    return () => {\n    67→      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    68→    };\n    69→  }, [query]);\n    70→\n    71→  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    72→    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    73→    onSelect({\n    74→      title: book.title,\n    75→      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n    76→      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n    77→        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n    78→        : \"\",\n    79→      olid,\n    80→    });\n    81→    setQuery(book.title);\n    82→    setOpen(false);\n    83→  };\n    84→\n    85→  return (\n    86→    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n    87→      <input\n    88→        type=\"text\"\n    89→        className=\"input-field\"\n    90→        value={query}\n    91→        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n    92→        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n    93→        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n    94→      />\n    95→      {loading && (\n    96→        <div\n    97→          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n    98→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n    99→        >\n   100→          Searching...\n   101→        </div>\n   102→      )}\n   103→\n   104→      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n   105→        <div\n   106→          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n   107→          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n   108→        >\n   109→          {results.map((book) => (\n   110→            <button\n   111→              key={book.key}\n   112→              type=\"button\"\n   113→              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n   114→              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n   115→            >\n   116→              {book.cover_i ? (\n   117→                <img\n   118→                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n   119→                  alt=\"\"\n   120→                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n   121→                />\n   122→              ) : (\n   123→                <div\n   124→                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n   125→                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n   126→                >\n   127→                  📖\n   128→                </div>\n   129→              )}\n   130→              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n   131→                <div\n   132→                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n   133→                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   134→                >\n   135→                  {book.title}\n   136→                </div>\n   137→                <div\n   138→                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n   139→                  style={{\n   140→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   141→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   142→                  }}\n   143→                >\n   144→                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n   145→                </div>\n   146→              </div>\n   147→            </button>\n   148→          ))}\n   149→        </div>\n   150→      )}\n   151→    </div>\n   152→  );\n   153→}\n   154→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"a0c07e08-3e02-4d7a-8840-3e462d61d67b","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:14.807Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01U4ZzfGTnHbV56i4521qk3K","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     4→import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n     5→import { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     6→\n     7→interface User {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  email: string;\n    10→  displayName: string;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→export default function Navbar() {\n    14→  const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n    15→  const [notifCount, setNotifCount] = useState(0);\n    16→  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n    17→  const router = useRouter();\n    18→\n    19→  useEffect(() => {\n    20→    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n    21→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    22→      .then((data) => {\n    23→        if (data.user) {\n    24→          setUser(data.user);\n    25→          // Fetch notification count\n    26→          fetch(\"/api/notifications\")\n    27→            .then((r) => r.json())\n    28→            .then((n) => setNotifCount(n.unreadCount || 0));\n    29→        }\n    30→      });\n    31→  }, []);\n    32→\n    33→  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    34→    await fetch(\"/api/auth/logout\", { method: \"POST\" });\n    35→    setUser(null);\n    36→    setMenuOpen(false);\n    37→    router.push(\"/\");\n    38→    router.refresh();\n    39→  };\n    40→\n    41→  return (\n    42→    <nav\n    43→      className=\"border-b sticky top-0 z-50\"\n    44→      style={{\n    45→        borderColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n    46→        backgroundColor: \"var(--color-bg)\",\n    47→      }}\n    48→    >\n    49→      <div className=\"max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 h-16 flex items-center justify-between\">\n    50→        <Link\n    51→          href=\"/\"\n    52→          className=\"text-xl font-bold\"\n    53→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\", letterSpacing: \"-0.03em\" }}\n    54→        >\n    55→          bookmate\n    56→        </Link>\n    57→\n    58→        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">\n    59→          {user ? (\n    60→            <>\n    61→              <Link\n    62→                href=\"/listings/create\"\n    63→                className=\"btn-primary text-sm\"\n    64→                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n    65→              >\n    66→                + New Listing\n    67→              </Link>\n    68→\n    69→              <div className=\"relative\">\n    70→                <button\n    71→                  onClick={() => setMenuOpen(!menuOpen)}\n    72→                  className=\"flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer\"\n    73→                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif\" }}\n    74→                >\n    75→                  <div\n    76→                    className=\"w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n    77→                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}\n    78→                  >\n    79→                    {user.displayName.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n    80→                  </div>\n    81→                  {notifCount > 0 && (\n    82→                    <span\n    83→                      className=\"badge text-white\"\n    84→                      style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\", fontSize: \"0.65rem\" }}\n    85→                    >\n    86→                      {notifCount}\n    87→                    </span>\n    88→                  )}\n    89→                </button>\n    90→\n    91→                {menuOpen && (\n    92→                  <div\n    93→                    className=\"absolute right-0 top-12 w-48 card shadow-lg py-2 px-0\"\n    94→                    style={{ padding: 0 }}\n    95→                  >\n    96→                    <div\n    97→                      className=\"px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold truncate\"\n    98→                      style={{\n    99→                        borderBottom: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n   100→                        fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   101→                      }}\n   102→                    >\n   103→                      {user.displayName}\n   104→                    </div>\n   105→                    <Link\n   106→                      href=\"/profile\"\n   107→                      className=\"block px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50\"\n   108→                      onClick={() => setMenuOpen(false)}\n   109→                      style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   110→                    >\n   111→                      Profile\n   112→                    </Link>\n   113→                    <Link\n   114→                      href=\"/notifications\"\n   115→                      className=\"block px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50\"\n   116→                      onClick={() => setMenuOpen(false)}\n   117→                      style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   118→                    >\n   119→                      Notifications\n   120→                      {notifCount > 0 && (\n   121→                        <span\n   122→                          className=\"ml-2 badge text-white\"\n   123→                          style={{\n   124→                            backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\",\n   125→                            fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n   126→                          }}\n   127→                        >\n   128→                          {notifCount}\n   129→                        </span>\n   130→                      )}\n   131→                    </Link>\n   132→                    <button\n   133→                      onClick={handleLogout}\n   134→                      className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50 authentication with the following patterns:\n\n**Routes requiring auth (correctly implemented):**\n- `/api/listings/create` — requires auth via `requireAuth()`\n- `/api/listings/[id]/join` — requires auth via `requireAuth()`\n- `/api/listings/[id]/apply` — requires auth via `requireAuth()`\n- `/api/listings/[id]/telegram` — requires auth via `requireAuth()`\n- `/api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram` — requires auth via `requireAuth()`\n- `/api/listings/[id]/auto-discord` — requires auth via `getSession()` check\n- `/api/listings/[id]/discord` — requires auth via `requireAuth()`\n- `/api/listings/[id]/applications` — requires auth via `requireAuth()`\n- `/api/profile` (PATCH) — requires auth via `requireAuth()`\n- `/api/profile/reading` — requires auth via `requireAuth()`\n- `/api/profile/genres` — requires auth via `requireAuth()`\n- `/api/profile/reputation` — requires auth via `requireAuth()`\n- `/api/notifications` (GET & PATCH) — requires auth via `requireAuth()`\n- `/api/ratings` (POST & GET) — requires auth via `requireAuth()`\n\n**Routes with proper public access (no auth needed):**\n- `/api/listings` (GET) — public listing search, correctly has no auth\n- `/api/listings/[id]` (GET) — public listing detail, correctly has visibility checks for full listings\n- `/api/auth/login` (POST) — public, properly validates credentials\n- `/api/auth/register` (POST) — public, has input validation (password length, email length, display name limits)\n- `/api/auth/me` (GET) — returns null when not authenticated\n- `/api/auth/logout` (POST) — safely destroys session\n\n**Webhook endpoints (protected by secret tokens):**\n- `/api/telegram/webhook` — validates `X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token` header\n- `/api/discord/webhook` — validates `X-Discord-Webhook-Secret` header\n- `/api/telegram/setup` (POST) — requires `TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET`\n- `/api/discord/setup` (POST) — requires `DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET`\n\n**Authorization checks (ownership/membership):**\n- `/api/listings/[id]/telegram` (POST) — verifies user is listing author\n- `/api/listings/[id]/auto-discord` (GET) — verifies user is listing author\n- `/api/listings/[id]/discord` (POST) — verifies user is listing author\n- `/api/listings/[id]/applications` (PATCH) — verifies user is listing author before approving/rejecting\n- `/api/listings/[id]` (GET) — checks membership and visibility rules for full listings\n- `/api/ratings` (POST) — verifies user is member of listing before allowing rating\n\n**Finding:** No unprotected sensitive endpoints found. All routes appropriately check authentication and authorization.\n\n---\n\n### 2. **TODO/FIXME Comments**\n\n**Result:** No TODO or FIXME comments found in the codebase.\n\n---\n\n### 3. **Linting {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_013UCSgKvTFNsh5e4mSrc8k4","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n     2→\n     3→const isConfigured =\n     4→  !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n     5→  !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n     6→  !!process.env.SMTP_FROM;\n     7→\n     8→let transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n     9→\n    10→function getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n    11→  if (!isConfigured) return null;\n    12→  if (!transporter) {\n    13→    transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({\n    14→      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST,\n    15→      port: parseInt(process.env.SMTP_PORT || \"587\", 10),\n    16→      secure: process.env.SMTP_SECURE === \"true\",\n    17→      ...(process.env.SMTP_USER && process.env.SMTP_PASS\n    18→        ? {\n    19→            auth: {\n    20→              user: process.env.SMTP_USER,\n    21→              pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS,\n    22→            },\n    23→          }\n    24→        : {}),\n    25→    });\n    26→  }\n    27→  return transporter;\n    28→}\n    29→\n    30→export async function sendEmail(\n    31→  to: string,\n    32→  subject: string,\n    33→  text: string,\n    34→  html?: string\n    35→): Promise<boolean> {\n    36→  const t = getTransporter();\n    37→  if (!t) return false;\n    38→\n    39→  try {\n    40→    await t.sendMail({\n    41→      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM,\n    42→      to,\n    43→      subject,\n    44→      text,\n    45→      html: html || text,\n    46→    });\n    47→    return true;\n    48→  } catch (err) {\n    49→    console.error(\"Failed to send email:\", err);\n    50→    return false;\n    51→  }\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→export function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n    55→  return isConfigured;\n    56→}\n    57→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"e085e04c-19be-4424-9f01-ad68b6bb39b3","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:20.771Z"}

Should be called once after deployment.\n     8→ * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n     9→ *\n    10→ * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n    11→ */\n    12→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    13→  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n    14→  if (!setupSecret) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json(\n    16→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n    17→      { status: 500 }\n    18→    );\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const body = await req.json();\n    22→  if (body.secret !== setupSecret) {\n    23→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json(\n    28→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n    29→      { status: 500 }\n    30→    );\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n    34→  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n    37→      { status: 500 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    42→  if (!bot) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json(\n    44→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    45→      { status: 500 }\n    46→    );\n    47→  }\n    48→\n    49→  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n    50→  if (!success) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n    53→      { status: 500 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({\n    58→    ok: true,\n    59→    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    60→    webhookUrl,\n    61→  });\n    62→}\n    63→\n    64→/**\n    65→ * GET /api/telegram/setup\n    66→ *\n    67→ * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n    68→ */\n    69→export async function GET() {\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({\n    71→    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    72→    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n    73→  });\n    74→}\n    75→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019eNW38BvDj2f1eSQc5dpLQ","session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"57ef6299-2589-4b46-91e1-bddeadc0bcc2","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:02:20.890Z"}

string;\n    10→  joined_at: string;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→interface Applicant {\n    14→  application_id: number;\n    15→  id: number;\n    16→  display_name: string;\n    17→  bio: string;\n book_cover_url: string;\n    27→  language: string;\n    28→  reading_pace: string;\n    29→  start_date: string;\n    30→  meeting_format: string;\n    31→  max_group_size: number;\n    32→
