auto-telegram feature\n   120→try {\n   121→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN telegram_chat_id INTEGER\");\n   122→} catch {\n   123→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   124→}\n   125→\n   126→// Tables for Telegram bot integration\n   127→db.exec(`\n   128→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n   129→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   130→    telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   131→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n   132→    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id),\n   133→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n   134→  );\n   135→\n   136→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n   137→    chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n   138→    chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n   139→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n   140→  );\n   141→`);\n   142→\n   143→// Rating and Reputation system\n   144→db.exec(`\n   145→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n   146→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY Database from \"better-sqlite3\";\nimport path from \"path\";\nimport fs from \"fs\";\n\nconst DB_DIR = process.env.DB_DIR || path.join(process.cwd(), \"data\");\nconst DB_PATH = path.join(DB_DIR, \"bookmate.db\");\n\n// Ensure data directory exists\nif (!fs.existsSync(DB_DIR)) {\n  fs.mkdirSync(DB_DIR, { recursive: true });\n}\n\nconst db = new Database(DB_PATH);\n\n// Enable WAL mode for better concurrent performance\ndb.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\ndb.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n\n// Initialize schema\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n    password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n    display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n    bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n    book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n    book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n    reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n    start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n    meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n    max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n    telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_genres (\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    genre TEXT NOT NULL,\n    PRIMARY KEY (user_id, genre),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    listing_id INTEGER,\n    type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    message TEXT NOT NULL,\n    is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'\n      CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n    message TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    decided_at TEXT,\n    UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n`);\n\n// Idempotent migration: add requires_approval column\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Idempotent migration: add platform_preference column\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram'\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Idempotent migration: add discord_link column\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN discord_link TEXT DEFAULT ''\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Idempotent migration: add discord_channel_id column\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT ''\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Idempotent migration: add telegram_chat_id column for auto-telegram feature\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN telegram_chat_id INTEGER\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Tables for Telegram bot integration\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n    chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n    chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n  );\n`);\n\n// Rating and Reputation system\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    rater_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    rated_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    score INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(score >= 1 AND score <= 5),\n    comment TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (rater_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (rated_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n`);\n\nexport default db;\n","numLines":161,"startLine":1,"totalLines":161}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01M7J1osfTmQkqqJFHordTSz","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    20→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"54be8eaf-8546-4fd7-a8da-726b9d18b77a","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:04:03.036Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;","numLines":20,"startLine":1,"totalLines":78}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011HzDa9nX3uMsUadAgySrjh","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→\n    17→  const listing = db\n    18→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    19→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    20→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"e4dccbad-f3be-434e-9a63-4da77ec8dbd5","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:04:03.138Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/discord/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n","numLines":20,"startLine":1,"totalLines":57}}}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0163hXi3qffEuqudt5ySkJFL","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateGroupDeepLink } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Returns the Telegram deep link for one-click group creation.\n    10→ * Only available to the listing author when the group is full\n    11→ * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function GET(\n    14→  _req: NextRequest,\n    15→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    16→) {\n    17→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    18→  if (!session) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    21→      { status: 401 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n    28→      { status: 404 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { id } = await params;\n    33→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    34→\n    35→  const listing = db\n    36→ \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"a48d3ebd-1541-4194-b9a7-6b48026d6eec","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:04:03.137Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { isBotConfigured, generateGroupDeepLink } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n\n/**\n * GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\n *\n * Returns the Telegram deep link for one-click group creation.\n * Only available to the listing author when the group is full\n * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n */\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });","numLines":40,"startLine":1,"totalLines":78}}}

function GET(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await getSession();\n    11→  if (!session.userId) {\n    12→ { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { isBotConfigured, generateBotInviteUrl } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await getSession();\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Discord bot is not configured\" },\n      { status: 503 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n","numLines":35,"startLine":1,"totalLines":66}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012xDDFCzrWcKpm6X5YJo5qM","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function GET(\n     8→  _req: NextRequest,\n     9→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    10→) {\n    11→  const { id } = await params;\n    12→\n    13→  const listing = db\n    14→    .prepare(\n    15→      `SELECT\n    16→        l.*,\n    17→        u.display_name as author_name\n    18→      FROM listings l\n    19→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    20→      WHERE l.id = ?`"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"bde9b3a6-489a-43d5-9b56-75ea9257c51d","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:04:04.191Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`","numLines":20,"startLine":1,"totalLines":99}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_014biyrnzbJeT8VK7kHKZKoQ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_015f2a9JL5eXYkYzYTf8KPYg","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh issue create --title \"fix: code review findings — webhook auth, input validation, DB indexes\" --label \"bug,P0,approved\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Code Review Findings (Session 13:00)\n\nAutomated code review found 7 issues — 3 critical, 4 important.\n\n### Critical\n1. **Webhook auth bypassed when secret is unset** — Telegram/Discord webhooks skip auth entirely if env var is missing. Allows unauthenticated DB writes. Fix: fail closed.\n2. **`parseInt(id)` NaN never validated** — All `[id]` routes pass NaN to SQLite without checking. Fix: add isNaN guard.\n3. **Author can re-join own listing** — No author check in join route; would cause 500 on duplicate insert. Fix: add author guard.\n\n### Important\n4. **`startDate` not format-validated in create route** — Can store arbitrary strings. Fix: regex check.\n5. **Group-full notification double-fire** — `>=` comparison allows concurrent joiners to both trigger. Fix: use `===`.\n6. **`GET /api/ratings` lacks membership check** — Any authenticated user can query any listing's ratings. Fix: add membership guard.\n7. **No DB indexes on FK columns** — Missing indexes on high-frequency query columns. Fix: add indexes.\nEOF\n)\" && gh issue edit 35 --add-project \"Bookmate\"","description":"Create bug issue for code review findings"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3042,"cache_read_input_tokens":44648,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":3042},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"ab576e87-fd15-49e2-8376-4a74429f5762"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01MijTLoTHzgiT9ZjDwHBvHo","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_0193EuLrrWsRPipcrdPEZLPT","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","old_string":"  // Verify webhook secret if configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (webhookSecret) {\n    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    }\n  }","new_string":"  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":659,"cache_read_input_tokens":47690,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":659},"output_tokens":4,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"7685d39f-b997-4e22-9b78-df1bf9cd2758"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":2,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"{\"fi"}},"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"e5184062-b336-43e2-817a-0dd92ca3f8b1"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0193EuLrrWsRPipcrdPEZLPT","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"546a006e-6d7c-4413-85be-18093191ac94","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:04:32.824Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","oldString":"  // Verify webhook secret if configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (webhookSecret) {\n    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    }\n  }","newString":"  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createChatInviteLink,\n  exportChatInviteLink,\n  sendMessage,\n  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n *\n * Handles two types of updates:\n *\n * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n *    and save it to the listing.\n *\n * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret if configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (webhookSecret) {\n    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    }\n  }\n\n  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n  try {\n    update = await req.json();\n  } catch {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n  if (update.message) {\n    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n  }\n\n  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\ninterface ChatMemberUpdate {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    title?: string;\n    type: string;\n  };\n  from: {\n    id: number;\n    first_name: string;\n  };\n  new_chat_member: {\n    user: {\n      id: number;\n      is_bot: boolean;\n    };\n    status: string;\n  };\n}\n\ninterface TelegramMessage {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    type: string;\n    title?: string;\n  };\n  text?: string;\n  from?: {\n    id: number;\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n *\n * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n * 1. Creates the group\n * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n *\n * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n */\nasync function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n\n  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n  if (\n    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n  ) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Only process group chats\n  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n  const pending = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (pending) {\n    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n      chat.id\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n  await sendMessage(\n    chat.id,\n    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n  );\n\n  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n  try {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n  } catch {\n    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Handle messages in group chats.\n * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n */\nasync function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const text = message.text.trim();\n\n  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n  if (text === \"/link\") {\n    // Find the most recent full listing without a telegram link\n    // that was authored by someone (we can't verify Telegram user = Bookmate user\n    // without account linking, so we just report available listings)\n    const unlinkedListings = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n      )\n      .all() as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"No unlinked reading groups found. The group may already be set up!\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n      // Auto-link the only available listing\n      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Show options\n    const listText = unlinkedListings\n      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${l.book_title}\"`)\n      .join(\"\\n\");\n    await sendMessage(\n      message.chat.id,\n      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link_ID command\n  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n  if (linkMatch) {\n    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n * 1. Generate an invite link\n * 2. Save it to the listing\n * 3. Notify all members\n * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n */\nasync function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to create an invite link\n  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  }\n\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    await sendMessage(\n      chatId,\n      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n        \"then try again with /link\"\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Save to database\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"telegram_ready\",\n      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":22,"oldLines":14,"newStart":22,"newLines":15,"lines":["  *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.","  */"," export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {","-  // Verify webhook secret if configured","+  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured","   const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;","-  if (webhookSecret) {","-    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");","-    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {","-      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });","-    }","+  if (!webhookSecret) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });","   }","+  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");","+  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });","+  }"," ","   let update: Record<string, unknown>;","   try {"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01MijTLoTHzgiT9ZjDwHBvHo","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01NGqigDzjC6EAyCZgzp5wmM","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","old_string":"  // Verify webhook secret if configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (webhookSecret) {\n    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    }\n  }","new_string":"  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":659,"cache_read_input_tokens":47690,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":659},"output_tokens":4,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"10ff311b-29a7-418d-9b7e-1512fcbb465e"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":3,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"{\"file_p"}},"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"affdeb64-a099-4464-bba9-5627a05d84aa"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01NGqigDzjC6EAyCZgzp5wmM","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"53ebd30c-f420-4099-9105-f4fe2ad15e0f","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:04:34.837Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","oldString":"  // Verify webhook secret if configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (webhookSecret) {\n    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    }\n  }","newString":"  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createTextChannel,\n  createChannelInvite,\n  sendChannelMessage,\n} from \"@/lib/discord\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n *\n * This endpoint handles:\n * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n *\n * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret if configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (webhookSecret) {\n    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    }\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { type } = body;\n\n    if (type === \"link\") {\n      return handleLink(body);\n    }\n\n    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    if (type === 1) {\n      // PING - respond with PONG\n      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nasync function handleLink(body: {\n  guildId: string;\n  listingId: number;\n  channelId?: string;\n}) {\n  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n\n  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n\n  // If no channel specified, create one\n  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n      .toLowerCase()\n      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n\n    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n      guildId,\n      channelName,\n      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n    );\n\n    if (!channel) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n        { status: 500 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n  }\n\n  // Create invite link\n  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Save to DB\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"discord_ready\",\n      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send welcome message to the channel\n  await sendChannelMessage(\n    targetChannelId,\n    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":19,"oldLines":14,"newStart":19,"newLines":15,"lines":["  * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.","  */"," export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {","-  // Verify webhook secret if configured","+  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured","   const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;","-  if (webhookSecret) {","-    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");","-    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {","-      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });","-    }","+  if (!webhookSecret) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });","   }","+  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");","+  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });","+  }"," ","   try {","     const body = await req.json();"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01MijTLoTHzgiT9ZjDwHBvHo","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_014oMs3RVWdbRGJDh8MotLxM","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","old_string":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.requires_approval) {","new_string":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.requires_approval) {"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":659,"cache_read_input_tokens":47690,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":659},"output_tokens":4,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"85e90d52-ae43-491d-b015-32af6e3ed326"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014oMs3RVWdbRGJDh8MotLxM","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"e16e22e6-f044-4543-b5d8-f5de3279478e","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:04:38.412Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","oldString":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.requires_approval) {","newString":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.requires_approval) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already a member\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (existing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  if (result.count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":14,"oldLines":6,"newStart":14,"newLines":9,"lines":[" ","   const { id } = await params;","   const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);","+  if (isNaN(listingId)) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });","+  }"," ","   const listing = db","     .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")"]},{"oldStart":23,"oldLines":6,"newStart":26,"newLines":11,"lines":["     return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });","   }"," ","+  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining","+  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });","+  }","+","   if (listing.requires_approval) {","     return NextResponse.json(","       { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01MijTLoTHzgiT9ZjDwHBvHo","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_018crtS8YXrekJNhK4VxqBvA","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","old_string":"  if (result.count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }","new_string":"  if (result.count === (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":659,"cache_read_input_tokens":47690,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":659},"output_tokens":4,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"33d5fa06-f51d-4cfb-9fc5-30d1843ad3f8"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null},"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":659,"cache_read_input_tokens":47690,"output_tokens":1236},"context_management":{"applied_edits":[]}},"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"2c8cc224-0f92-4421-8b01-e98f6e0b2741"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_018crtS8YXrekJNhK4VxqBvA","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"a49f6539-ffa4-4f75-81cc-9a1ab6b422a7","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:04:40.044Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","oldString":"  if (result.count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }","newString":"  if (result.count === (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already a member\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (existing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  if (result.count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":84,"oldLines":7,"newStart":84,"newLines":7,"lines":["   // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)","   notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");"," ","-  if (result.count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {","+  if (result.count === (listing.max_group_size as number)) {","     notifyGroupFull(listingId);","   }"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01LppYbnKbuYUDdJN5CUFpwM","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_0144Uznss6xTXziQXw6kgpHb","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts","old_string":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;","new_string":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1531,"cache_read_input_tokens":48349,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1531},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"8be75ec1-0991-4fae-8187-0120f4d32c16"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":2,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"{\"fil"}},"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"ef9ac355-aca6-4b07-b04c-885ac564063e"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0144Uznss6xTXziQXw6kgpHb","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"f67a7c86-e6c2-42eb-8e76-3b1e2fc210db","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:04:49.428Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts","oldString":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;","newString":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group does not require approval. Join directly.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already a member\n  const isMember = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (isMember) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already applied (pending)\n  const existingApp = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT id, status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId) as { id: number; status: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (existingApp) {\n    if (existingApp.status === \"pending\") {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You have already applied\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n    if (existingApp.status === \"approved\") {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already approved\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n    // If rejected, allow re-application by updating status back to pending\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'pending', decided_at = NULL, applied_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(existingApp.id);\n\n    notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n\n  // Insert new application\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n  ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":14,"oldLines":6,"newStart":14,"newLines":9,"lines":[" ","   const { id } = await params;","   const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);","+  if (isNaN(listingId)) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });","+  }"," ","   const listing = db","     .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"7fc71870-5312-4266-918b-99e1ee4ef187","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:04:51.367Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","oldString":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;","newString":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n\n  if (!applicationId || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n  const application = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!application) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n\n  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n        return { isFull: true };\n      }\n      return { isFull: false };\n    });\n\n    try {\n      const result = approveTransaction();\n\n      notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n      if (result.isFull) {\n        notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n        // Reject remaining pending applications\n        const pendingApps = db\n          .prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n          )\n          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n\n        for (const app of pendingApps) {\n          db.prepare(\n            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n          ).run(app.id);\n          notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n        }\n      }\n\n      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    } catch (err) {\n      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":14,"oldLines":6,"newStart":14,"newLines":9,"lines":[" ","   const { id } = await params;","   const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);","+  if (isNaN(listingId)) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });","+  }"," ","   const listing = db","     .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

undefined;","newString":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n\n  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\")) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/...)\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    telegramLink.trim(),\n    listingId\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":13,"oldLines":6,"newStart":13,"newLines":9,"lines":[" ","   const { id } = await params;","   const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);","+  if (isNaN(listingId)) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });","+  }"," ","   const listing = db","     .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

} from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n\n  if (\n    !discordLink ||\n    !(\n      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    )\n  ) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error:\n          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/...)\",\n      },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    discordLink.trim(),\n    listingId\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":13,"oldLines":6,"newStart":13,"newLines":9,"lines":[" ","   const { id } = await params;","   const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);","+  if (isNaN(listingId)) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });","+  }"," ","   const listing = db","     .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01LppYbnKbuYUDdJN5CUFpwM","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01PC3PV7p1wBrb9zZMDBJQUg","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram/route.ts","old_string":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });","new_string":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1531,"cache_read_input_tokens":48349,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1531},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"27743693-62a7-4b19-a1ac-a8c2b6013118"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PC3PV7p1wBrb9zZMDBJQUg","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bcf24925-f3c9-4a21-8262-ea37e50a9e93","uuid":"b45bd490-d192-4fd1-9c7e-9766fab940c6","timestamp":"2026-03-20T13:04:57.133Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram/route.ts","oldString":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });","newString":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { isBotConfigured, generateGroupDeepLink } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n\n/**\n * GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\n *\n * Returns the Telegram deep link for one-click group creation.\n * Only available to the listing author when the group is full\n * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n */\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the organizer can create the Telegram group\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Group must be full before creating a Telegram group\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Telegram link already set\", telegramLink: listing.telegram_link },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const deepLink = await generateGroupDeepLink(listingId);\n  if (!deepLink) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to generate deep link. Check bot configuration.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    deepLink,\n    instructions:\n      \"Click the link to open Telegram and create a group. The bot will automatically generate an invite link for your reading group.\",\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":31,"oldLines":6,"newStart":31,"newLines":9,"lines":[" ","   const { id } = await params;","   const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);","+  if (isNaN(listingId)) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });","+  }"," ","   const listing = db","     .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

 const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });","newString":"  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { isBotConfigured, generateBotInviteUrl } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await getSession();\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Discord bot is not configured\" },\n      { status: 503 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set up the Discord group\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"The group is not full yet\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"A Discord link has already been set\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const inviteUrl = generateBotInviteUrl(listingId);\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    inviteUrl,\n    instructions:\n      \"Click the link to add the Bookmate bot to your Discord server. \" +\n      \"The bot will create a reading group channel and generate an invite link for your members.\",\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":24,"oldLines":6,"newStart":24,"newLines":9,"lines":[" ","   const { id } = await params;","   const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);","+  if (isNaN(listingId)) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });","+  }"," ","   const listing = db","     .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id =
